name: fund-analysis-site
description: 基金分析网站 - 场内ETF数据追踪与投资建议

scripts.start:bg: nohup node server/index.js > server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .server.pid && echo 'Server started (PID:' $(cat .server.pid) ')'
scripts.stop: kill $(cat .server.pid 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null && rm -f .server.pid && echo 'Server stopped' || echo 'No server running'
